name: GitHub Models
desc: Free rate-limited API access to 40+ frontier models including GPT-4o, GPT-5, DeepSeek-R1, Llama 3.3 70B, and Mistral. Requires only a GitHub account. OpenAI-compatible endpoint at https://models.github.ai. Prototyping only per ToS.
why: Free frontier model APIs with just a GitHub account — GPT-4o, DeepSeek-R1, Llama 3.3 at zero cost

name: Cloudflare Workers AI
desc: Global edge inference platform with 10,000 free neurons per day (resets daily — ~200 LLM requests). 50+ open-source models including Llama 3.3, Mistral Small, Qwen, Stable Diffusion XL, Whisper. No credit card needed. Runs on 300+ global data centers.
why: 10K free neurons/day on Cloudflare's global edge — ~200 LLM requests daily with no credit card

name: NVIDIA NIM
desc: Free LLM inference API with 1,000-5,000 inference credits. Access to 160+ models with ~50 free endpoints including Nemotron, Llama, Qwen, and DeepSeek. 40 requests per minute. Self-host available free on up to 16 GPUs. Phone verification required — system is frequently reported as broken.
why: 1K-5K free inference credits on NVIDIA hardware — test A100/H100 inference for free (phone verification often broken)

name: HuggingFace Inference Providers
desc: HuggingFace's official inference API with $0.10/month in free credits. Access to thousands of open-source models via serverless inference (limited to models under 10GB; some popular larger models also supported).
why: $0.10/mo free inference credits — token-level pricing on thousands of open models from HuggingFace

name: Vercel AI Gateway
desc: AI gateway with unified billing and observability across providers. $5/month free credits for a restricted subset of models. Many premium models (Gemini 3, Claude Opus, DeepSeek, Grok) are blocked on the free tier. Best for Vercel ecosystem users.
why: $5/mo free AI gateway credits — unified billing and observability, but many models blocked on free tier

name: SambaNova Cloud
desc: Fastest inference for open models using custom RDU hardware. $5 free credits (~30M tokens on Llama 8B) plus an ongoing rate-limited free tier (~200K tokens/day, ~40 requests/day) that continues after credits expire. No credit card needed. Models include DeepSeek V3.1, Llama 3.3 70B, MiniMax M2.7, Gemma 4.
why: $5 credits + permanent free tier at ~200K tok/day — fastest inference on open models, no CC required

name: Scaleway Generative APIs
desc: European cloud provider's generative AI API with 1 million free one-time tokens + 60 min free audio transcription. 17 models including Qwen 3.5 397B, Mistral Medium 3.5, Gemma 4, Llama 3.3. Credit card and phone verification required. GDPR-compliant, EU data centers.
why: 1M free tokens on EU-hosted models — GDPR-compliant inference with Qwen 3.5 and Mistral (CC + phone required)

name: Baseten
desc: GPU model deployment platform. $30 one-time free credits for deploying custom models or using the Model Library. Pay-per-minute GPU billing (T4: $0.63/hr, A100: $4.00/hr, H100: $6.50/hr). Credit card required after credits are exhausted.
why: $30 free GPU credits for model deployment — test custom LLM inference on A100s/H100s

name: AI21 Studio

name: Upstage

name: Inference.net
